name: codex-ccswitch-gateway
description: Local Codex model gateway backed by CC Switch provider registry.

scripts.electron:check: node --check electron/main.mjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs && node --check electron/renderer/app.js
scripts.check: node --check bin/cli.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/launchd.mjs && node --check src/catalog.mjs && node --check src/ccswitch.mjs && node --check src/codex-config.mjs && node --check src/translator.mjs && node --check src/history-unify.mjs && node --check src/paths.mjs
scripts.dist:check: npm run electron:check && npm run check

author: zhangyinglong
